scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/lona && npm run build -w packages/lona-geom && npm run build -w packages/lona-curves && npm run build -w demos/show-curves && npm run build -w demos/profile-surface-optimisation
scripts.watch: npm run build && concurrently -n lona,lona-geom,lona-curves -c blue,green,magenta "npm run watch -w packages/lona" "npm run watch -w packages/lona-geom" "npm run watch -w packages/lona-curves"
scripts.check: npm run formatcheck && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
